meta_title: About Us | NextGen Floor Solutions Thailand
meta_description: Restoring floors since 2004. ISO certified German technology with expertise from Finland, delivering premium floor solutions in Thailand.
hero_description: Premier floor restoration services with German technology and Finnish expertise. We are committed to bringing your floors back to life with sustainable and innovative solutions.
certs_description: Our commitment to excellence is backed by international standards.
testimonial1_text: The floor restoration exceeded our expectations. Minimal downtime and the results are stunning. Highly recommended for any commercial facility.
testimonial2_text: Professional team, high-quality work. The PU coating has made our factory floor much easier to maintain and looks brand new.
testimonial3_text: We had our 30-year-old terrazzo floor restored. It now looks better than when it was first installed. Amazing work!
training_description: Our technicians undergo rigorous training programs directly from Dr. Schutz in Germany and our operations team brings extensive experience from Finland.
training_certified_desc: Regular workshops and certifications from industry leaders.
training_finnish_desc: Decades of experience in Nordic floor restoration brought to Thailand.
training_equipment_desc: State-of-the-art machinery for precise and efficient restoration.
training_team_desc: Trained in Germany & Finland. Serving Thailand.
